results.name: believe
results.note: 1000 signed beliefs with shared alice seed; includes Ed25519 sign + BLAKE3 id + store + audit append + subscription fan-out (no subscriptions)

results.name: recall_empty_query
results.note: 200 empty-query recalls over 1000 stored beliefs; lazy blob skips JSON.stringify of each belief.object

results.name: recall_with_query
results.note: 200 recall("even") queries over 1000 stored beliefs; subject/predicate prefilter short-circuits before stringifying object

results.name: believe_with_fanout
results.note: 1000 beliefs with 10 predicate-filtered subscriptions + 1 unfiltered; indexed fan-out should keep overhead constant w.r.t. bucket miss
